case_title: DUM VICTORIA VS TOPAI CONSTRUCTION SERVICE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,115.00 FILED BY DUM VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT TOPAI CONSTRUCTION SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
